title: Operations Rail Console
concept: A dense power-user Playground console with a labeled left operations rail, a protected live WordPress shell, and a command deck where Create, Save, Library, Manage, Blueprints, Data, Logs, and Transfer modes mutate the same active Playground object.
focus: left operational rail with readable labels
dense command deck for power users
command search discovery with executable forms
high-contrast shell with readable white panels
flows: Download database.sqlite end to end with selected SQLite database details, progress, success result, transfer history, and log mutation
Search for a command, select a grouped result, run its form, and mutate the active shell path, storage identity, selected object, or transfer history
Save an unsaved Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct progress, identity, reload consequences, and Library row mutation
Delete a saved Playground with confirmation, cancellation path, final row removal, event logging, and active fallback when needed
Start or replace through Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and .zip import with route-specific inputs and constraints
Use Site Manager settings, file browser, Blueprint editor, database tools, logs, GitHub export, zip download, database download, and Blueprint bundle actions without hiding the live WordPress shell
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview route
Gutenberg PR or branch preview route
GitHub import with account connection and non-persistent token consequence
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with validation and replacement consequence
Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest representative subset of 43
Featured Blueprint shortcuts including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Friends feed reader, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Save temporary Playground to a local directory
Browser and local save progress states
Saved, unsaved, and local-directory Playground differences
Saved Playground open, rename, delete confirmation, cancel, row removal, and fallback state
Current shell path input and refresh
Homepage and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, saved, and local storage badges with reset or reload consequences
WordPress version, PHP version, language, older-version, network, and multisite settings
Destructive reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, selected editor, dirty marker, save, and result state
Blueprint editor with URL, validation, copy link, download bundle, run replacement, and result state
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download progress, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with warning and success events
Export to GitHub
Download active Playground as .zip
Portability history for GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle actions
